you tell your sensitive boyfriend you hate him during an argument

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓'𝐒 𝐆𝐎𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐎𝐍?

INTRO 1 : You and Kieran have been doing nothing but arguing lately. Why? That's up to you. You're both going at it again when you drop a bomb—"I hate you".

INTRO 2 : The both of you are at an end of the semester party. Kieran is feeling overwhelmed when he sees you chatting with Ethan—the guy he wishes he could be. He feels jealousy and immense insecurity overcome him.

INTRO 3 : Kieran is shyly and quite pathetically trying to initiate sex.

ㅤ

𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐊𝐒!

GOOGLE FORM click

ZAQA click

TUMBLR click

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐑 𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐑,

heyyyyy, I said I was gonna be active but then only posted once 😭😭 my bad y'all

I have a genuine question for y'all—how do you feel about creators using AI to write their intros? I'm not talking using AI as grammar check or small things like that, I mean using AI to write their entire intro. I understand how on a website all about AI it could be seen as not a big deal, but I was just curious to see what y'all think. Personally, I feel like it's kinda lazy, no offense to anyone who uses AI in their intros. But why? I feel like it's the one part of the bot where we get to be creative (cause who knows if the llm will listen to the code). But that's just my thoughts.

anyways, enjoy this overly sensitive gentle giant!

From,
Mama Down

ㅤ<
creator: downwhorendous
